name: Plane
description: Open-source project tracking tool that helps teams plan, track, and manage their software projects with issues, cycles, and modules.

notes.text: First user to sign up becomes the instance admin. Initial build takes 10-15 minutes.
Admin panel (God Mode) is available at `/god-mode/` for instance configuration.
If the container IP changes, rebuild the frontend apps or run the update script to apply the new URL.
